headline: TSLA opens Apr 27 at ~$366 (-2.1%) — market risk-off on Iran Strait geopolitical developments; Deutsche Bank reiterates Buy, calls Q1 a 'surprisingly large beat'; post-earnings pressure continues, stock -19% YTD

Tesla confirms Cybercab has NO production cap as ramp begins — Musk says volumes will scale 'exponentially by end of 2026'; demand-driven production model unlike any prior Tesla vehicle; confirms extreme management confidence in Cybercab trajectory

Tesla hits $546M annual recurring revenue from FSD subscriptions — 1.28M active subscribers as of Q1 (+51% YoY); subscription-only transition turning FSD into a SaaS revenue stream; fastest-growing segment in Tesla's business model
Giga Berlin records best-ever Q1 (61K+ vehicles), announces 20% production increase and 1,000 new hires — Electrek notes factory still running at 65% of 375K-unit capacity despite the record quarter

FSD v14.3.2 released — first unified AI model across Smart Summon, FSD, and Robotaxi fleet; vehicles no longer switch neural networks between parking lots and public roads; major step toward production-grade unsupervised autonomy

Tesla launches Robotaxi app for Android — was iOS-only since Austin launch; Android release opens service to majority of smartphone users ahead of multi-city expansion; app still invite/region-limited

Motley Fool post-earnings: Musk says robotaxi 'will not be super material this year' — targets 'dozen or so states'; $25B capex + negative FCF become new bear anchors; bull case rests entirely on 2027+ Optimus + Cybercab scale
Analyst: Cybercab to become Tesla's flagship model long-term — 'most of production will be Cybercab'; Roadster will be the only manually-driven car in Tesla's eventual fleet

Musk reveals 8M sq-ft Optimus factory at Giga Texas; Model S/X production ends late July/Aug; Optimus 3 kicks off at Fremont thereafter — Roadster 'only a month late so far,' hover capability confirmed

🚀 Musk posts official Cybercab production video — 'Cybercab has started production'; footage shows interior with NO steering wheel or pedals; multiple units confirmed built; TSLA +<1% premarket after post-earnings selloff
source: Elon Musk / X · Bloomberg · Benzinga · Sherwood News
